description: Create a GitHub Actions Continuous Integration workflow that triggers on push to master and develop branches, excluding documentation files. The workflow should have two jobs: build-linux and build-windows. The build-linux job should run on ubuntu-latest, check out the code, prepare the file tree, configure CMake, build, install, and run unit tests. The build-windows job should run on windows-latest, check out the code, clone vcpkg, bootstrap it, download prebuilt binaries, unzip them, display installed packages, get the CUDA toolkit, install CMake, build, and run unit tests. Both jobs should skip drafts and use specific dependencies and environment variables.
